title: shim bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[15.8-1.0.5]
- Add support for Oracle signed shim [Orabug: 38029686]
- Add vendor shim binaries signed with Oracle Secure Boot Signing (key 2) [Orabug: 38029686]
full_text:
[15.8-1.0.5]
- Add support for Oracle signed shim [Orabug: 38029686]
- Add vendor shim binaries signed with Oracle Secure Boot Signing (key 2) [Orabug: 38029686]
